entities.context: JSONL file format ([ID]-chrono.jsonl) for tracking utterances, keeps last 14 turns

entities.context: Mode for turn-by-turn session tracking with automatic compression

entities.context: Method tracking utterances, summaries, ideas, directions, and marked turns

entities.name: Compression
entities.context: Automatic process triggered when session exceeds 14 turns

entities.name: Archive summary
entities.context: Compressed summary of older turns, capped at 80 words

entities.context: Deduplicated list of ideas, max 6 items

entities.name: Directions suggested
entities.context: List of suggested directions, max 3 items

entities.name: Next questions
entities.context: List of follow-up questions, max 5 items

entities.name: Marked turns
entities.context: Turns flagged for emphasis or review
